blocks.body: Causative is a have/get + object + V3 construction, which means that someone else performs an action for us or instead of us. This is an important construction to describe the services we order.

{ "title": "8. Short summary", "items": [ "Causative: have/get + object + V3 - someone does something for us.", "Have something done is more formal, neutral.", "Get something done - more colloquial, emphasizes effort.", "Typical situations: services, repairs, medicine, delivery.", "Negative causative: I had my wallet stolen is an unpleasant event.", "Objection: didn't have/get + object + V3.", "Question: Did you have/get + object + V3?", "Object always stands between have/get and V3!" ] }
